name: @codebuff/evalbuff
description: Automated docs optimization loop: run agent → judge → analyze failures → propose doc edits

scripts.test: bun test src/__tests__/criteria.test.ts src/__tests__/docs-optimizer.test.ts src/__tests__/morning-report.test.ts src/__tests__/cli-runner.test.ts && bun test src/__tests__/loop.integration.test.ts && bun test src/__tests__/e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: bun test src/__tests__/criteria.test.ts src/__tests__/docs-optimizer.test.ts src/__tests__/morning-report.test.ts src/__tests__/cli-runner.test.ts
